About Anumodya

Rooted in tradition,
made for today

A spiritual wellness app combining Indian practices like meditation, pranayama, mantra chanting, and mindful living — designed to help you reconnect with yourself, every single day.

🌬️

Pranayama & Breathwork

Ancient breathing techniques adapted for modern life, guided step-by-step.

📿

Mala Jaap & Mantra

Sacred Sanskrit mantras with guided chanting sessions and counters.

🧘

Guided Meditation

Themed sessions for mental clarity, focus, and deep inner stillness.

What You Get

Everything you need to
begin your practice

🧘

Guided Meditation

Sessions for mental clarity, stress relief, and awareness — from 5 to 30 minutes.

🌬️

Pranayama Breathwork

Step-by-step breathing exercises rooted in yogic science for calm and energy.

📿

Mala Jaap Counter

Sacred mantra counting with 11, 21, 54, and 108 repetition modes.

🌿

Daily Mindful System

Set your intention each morning with guided affirmations and daily reflections.

The path forward

Simple steps to stillness

1

Find your focus

Discover practices that resonate with you today.

2

Let go and listen

Let a gentle voice lead you through practices that clear the mind and soothe the heart.

3

Build your ritual

Watch your journey unfold as you make more space for yourself every day.

Legal

Your Privacy

Your journey is private and personal. We value the trust you place in us and keep your data safe, always.

Introduction

Anumodya ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information about you when you use our iOS application. By using Anumodya, you agree to the terms described here.

Data We Collect

We collect only what is necessary to deliver a meaningful experience:

  • Account information (name, email address) provided during registration
  • Usage data such as practices completed, session duration, and preferences
  • Device information (device type, OS version) for compatibility
  • Anonymised analytics to improve app content and performance

We do not collect health records, financial information, or precise location without explicit consent.

How We Use Your Data

  • Personalise practice recommendations and your wellness journey
  • Send optional notifications about your daily practices (with your permission)
  • Analyse anonymised trends to improve app content
  • Ensure app security and prevent fraudulent activity

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party for marketing purposes.

Data Protection

Your data is encrypted in transit using industry-standard TLS. We follow Apple's App Store data protection guidelines and conduct regular security reviews to safeguard your information.

Your Rights

  • Access or download your personal data from account settings
  • Request correction of inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of your account and all associated data
  • Opt out of analytics tracking in app settings
  • Withdraw notification consent at any time

Contact

For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, reach us at:

Anumodya · Galgotias University
Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India
anumodya03@gmail.com

We respond to all requests within 30 days.

Last updated: April 2026
